scripts.build:mac: npm run prepare:icons && npm run prepare:dist && tauri build --bundles app,dmg
scripts.build:desktop: npm run prepare:icons && npm run prepare:dist && tauri build
scripts.build:windows: npm run prepare:icons && npm run prepare:dist && tauri build --bundles nsis
scripts.add:android: npm run prepare:dist && cap add android
scripts.add:ios: npm run prepare:dist && cap add ios
scripts.prepare:ios: npm run prepare:icons && npm run prepare:dist && cap copy ios
scripts.sync:ios: npm run prepare:icons && npm run prepare:dist && cap sync ios
